[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101100000 3
1 000100010 2
2 100101001 4
3 000000000 a
4 001011001 4
5 010111101 6
6 011001101 5
7 010000110 3

67 76 000100101 3
70 07 000000001 1

13 31 011001101 5 match 6
24 42 010000000 1

72 27 000000001 1
